name: Golden Dragon Summoner
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>召</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>喚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Tribute 1 monster, then target 1 monster on the field; return it to the hand. You can only use this effect of "Golden Dragon Summoner" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute 1 monster, then target 1 monster on the field; return it to the hand. You can only use this effect of "Golden Dragon Summoner" once per turn.
